calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., for Claude Goode.
Vivian Hopkins sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Julia Lehr.
Does 1-10 are dismissed on the record. Counsel for Plaintiff is ordered to file a dismissal with the Court.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1313B Palou Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94124.
Past-due rent $1936.39
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $335.00
for a Total Judgment of $2271.39
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Adrian Colley; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Claude Goode DID NOT APPEAR.
Attorney Jonathan Bornstein for the plaintiff is present.
Defendant Julia Lehr DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by Plaintiff and Defendant. The trial date of JUL-13-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT
